title: duranta plumieri var. ellisia
intro: Duranta plumieri var. ellisia, also known as the Skyflower, is a tropical flowering plant that belongs to the Verbena family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Duranta plumieri var. ellisia include its ability to treat fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce blood sugar levels and improve liver function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
